name: Azumanga daioh the Roleplay
description:
Azumanga Daioh bot for all azumanga fans! :D

Welcome to the Azumanda Daioh the RPG, the same bot, but with a (slightly) more clean token use, and now a lorebook! to add more imersion.

have fun with your favorite characters and make sure to not be shy to suggest above :)

Yapping time:

i decided to update this bot for a smaller ammount of tokens to provide the JLLM and low token proxy users the best experience possible

anyway, take care everyone! enjoy :)

(All characters set to +18)
creator: HenriqueMFC
